title: BeeKeepers
description: A simple plugin to display BeeNests info when clicking.
body:
BeeKeepers is a simple plugin designed to provide more info to the beekeepers around the world!

## Features
The plugin only provides one feature: the ability to right click on any Bee Nest or Beehive with empty hands (left and right) to display its current state (as an actionbar). In particular, it is possible to display how many bees are inside out of the maximum amount, aswell as a progress bar showing when the honey will be ready to collect.

## Configuration
The plugin provides a messages.yml file containing all the plugin messages and string. In here it is possible to configure how to display the previously described info.

## Permissions
beekeepers.info: the permission required in order to use the plugin.
